systemStrings.homeSubtitle: Competitive trivia for the bar, the dorm, and the street.

announcements.title: Tonight's Warm-Up
announcements.body: Release messages here should feel like a home-screen nudge for a bar-or-dorm crowd, not a school bulletin.

matchPresets.name: 6-6-10 Casual Classic
matchPresets.description: Default casual/classic room for bars, dorms, and low-friction rematches. These room templates are provisional V1 scaffolding until the authoritative LOCKOUT competitive-mode spec is finalized.

matchPresets.name: 8-8-10 Full Party
matchPresets.description: Alternate V1 party room for longer in-person sessions. These room templates are provisional V1 scaffolding until the authoritative LOCKOUT competitive-mode spec is finalized.

matchPresets.name: 10-10-10 Long Party
matchPresets.description: Alternate V1 party room for longer in-person sessions. These room templates are provisional V1 scaffolding until the authoritative LOCKOUT competitive-mode spec is finalized.

matchPresets.name: 1v1 Future Duel
matchPresets.description: Future-facing duel room for friends, followers, and randoms while the online rulebook is still being finalized. These room templates are provisional V1 scaffolding until the authoritative LOCKOUT competitive-mode spec is finalized.

studyPacks.name: Public Welcome Bundle
studyPacks.description: Player-facing starter bundle that the shipped app can actually load right now.

questions.questionText: What is the primary color of the LOCKOUT! neon aesthetic?
This is a public sample bank. Are you ready to dominate some trivia?
